title: Green nickel for sustainable electrification
source: Research in Germany / Max Planck Institute for Sustainable Materials
summary: Researchers developed a carbon-free, energy-saving nickel extraction method that uses hydrogen plasma instead of carbon-based processes. The approach is reported to cut CO2 emissions by 84% and improve energy efficiency by up to 18% when powered by renewable electricity and green hydrogen.

title: Danieli to modernize Italy-based Cogne Acciai’s continuous caster
summary: Danieli announced that Cogne Acciai Speciali has chosen it to modernize the continuous caster at its Aosta steelworks. The project includes replacing the cooling chamber, adding new roller modules and hoods, and preassembling the new chamber to reduce installation time.

title: Italy's Cogne Acciai Speciali uses 100% renewable electricity at all its European plants
summary: Cogne Acciai Speciali said all of its European plants have been using 100% renewable electricity since January 2024. The company said this means its products will have zero Scope 2 emissions impact, according to its sales and marketing director.

title: Italy's Tenaris posts surprise 2% rise in sales on stable US, Canada drilling
summary: Tenaris reported a surprise 2% rise in third-quarter net sales, helped by steady drilling activity in North America. The company also warned that margins would be pressured by the full impact of tariff costs.
